'''vofakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hidable|hidable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-f-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hidable|hidable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vofakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vofakithi|vofakithi]] || [[word:vofakiji|vofakiji]] || [[word:vofakishi|vofakishi]] || [[word:vofakiki|vofakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vofakuthuthu|vofakuthuthu]] || [[word:vofakujuju|vofakujuju]] || [[word:vofakushushu|vofakushushu]] || [[word:vofakukuku|vofakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vofakuthu|vofakuthu]] || [[word:vofakuju|vofakuju]] || [[word:vofakushu|vofakushu]] || [[word:vofakuku|vofakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vofakufthuf|vofakufthuf]] || [[word:vofakufjuf|vofakufjuf]] || [[word:vofakufshuf|vofakufshuf]] || [[word:vofakufkuf|vofakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vofakethe|vofakethe]] || [[word:vofakeje|vofakeje]] || [[word:vofakeshe|vofakeshe]] || [[word:vofakeke|vofakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vofakothotho|vofakothotho]] || [[word:vofakojojo|vofakojojo]] || [[word:vofakoshosho|vofakoshosho]] || [[word:vofakokoko|vofakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vofakotho|vofakotho]] || [[word:vofakojo|vofakojo]] || [[word:vofakosho|vofakosho]] || [[word:vofakoko|vofakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vofakofthof|vofakofthof]] || [[word:vofakofjof|vofakofjof]] || [[word:vofakofshof|vofakofshof]] || [[word:vofakofkof|vofakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vofakÃŸfthÃŸf|vofakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vofakÃŸfjÃŸf|vofakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vofakÃŸfshÃŸf|vofakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vofakÃŸfkÃŸf|vofakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vofakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|vofakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vofakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|vofakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vofakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|vofakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vofakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|vofakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vofakÃŸfthÃŸf|vofakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vofakÃŸfjÃŸf|vofakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vofakÃŸfshÃŸf|vofakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vofakÃŸfkÃŸf|vofakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vofakÃŸfthÃŸf|vofakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vofakÃŸfjÃŸf|vofakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vofakÃŸfshÃŸf|vofakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vofakÃŸfkÃŸf|vofakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vofakÃḊthÃḊ|vofakÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:vofakÃḊjÃḊ|vofakÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:vofakÃḊshÃḊ|vofakÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:vofakÃḊkÃḊ|vofakÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vofakathatha|vofakathatha]] || [[word:vofakajaja|vofakajaja]] || [[word:vofakashasha|vofakashasha]] || [[word:vofakakaka|vofakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vofakatha|vofakatha]] || [[word:vofakaja|vofakaja]] || [[word:vofakasha|vofakasha]] || [[word:vofakaka|vofakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vofakafthaf|vofakafthaf]] || [[word:vofakafjaf|vofakafjaf]] || [[word:vofakafshaf|vofakafshaf]] || [[word:vofakafkaf|vofakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vofakasha|vofakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vofakshÃḋsha|vofakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vofakrosha|vofakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vofakmusha|vofakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vofakyasha|vofakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govofaknkshÃḋsha|govofaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govofaknkrosha|govofaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govofaknkmusha|govofaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govofaknkyasha|govofaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vofafakasha|vofafakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vofafakshÃḋsha|vofafakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vofafakrosha|vofafakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vofafakmusha|vofafakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vofafakyasha|vofafakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govofafaknkshÃḋsha|govofafaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govofafaknkrosha|govofafaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govofafaknkmusha|govofafaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govofafaknkyasha|govofafaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vefÃḊkasha|vefÃḊkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vefÃḊkshÃḋsha|vefÃḊkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vefÃḊkrosha|vefÃḊkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vefÃḊkmusha|vefÃḊkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vefÃḊkyasha|vefÃḊkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govefÃḊknkshÃḋsha|govefÃḊknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govefÃḊknkrosha|govefÃḊknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govefÃḊknkmusha|govefÃḊknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govefÃḊknkyasha|govefÃḊknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vofakasha|vofakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vofakshÃḋsha|vofakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vofakrosha|vofakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vofakmusha|vofakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vofakyasha|vofakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govofaknkshÃḋsha|govofaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govofaknkrosha|govofaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govofaknkmusha|govofaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govofaknkyasha|govofaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
